name: English Language
description: English language proficiency curriculum with progressive vocabulary, grammar, and reading comprehension levels

levels.label: Kindergarten
levels.description: Basic vocabulary (100 words), simple sentences, letter recognition

levels.label: Grade 1
levels.description: Simple reading comprehension, basic grammar (subject-verb agreement)

levels.label: Grade 2
levels.description: Intermediate reading, tenses (present, past, future), articles

levels.label: Elementary
levels.description: Full elementary proficiency, conditionals, passive voice, complex sentences

levels.label: Intermediate
levels.description: Advanced grammar, essay writing, reading comprehension at grade 6-8 level

levels.label: Advanced
levels.description: Academic English, complex writing, literature analysis
